decisions.rationale: Block p005_c0002 describes Bx12 SBS features on Fordham Road, not Webster Avenue. The Bx12 is a different corridor than the Webster Avenue SBS project that is the subject of this source. No block explicitly states that Bx12 curbside bus lanes are a treatment on the Webster Avenue corridor or project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▮ New/upgraded bus lanes – Curbside 7am-7pm lanes – Red coloration – Overhead signs for visibility – "Delivery Windows" in retail core ▮ Off-board fare collection ▮ Transit Signal Priority ▮ Simplified service pattern ▮ New shelters

decisions.rationale: Cited blocks p004_c0007 (image block, no text) and p005_c0002 (Bx12 SBS features, a different corridor) do not explicitly state that off-board fare collection is a treatment on the Webster Avenue corridor or project. Page 4 shows generic SBS features without naming Webster Avenue; page 5 is about Bx12 on Fordham Road.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▮ New/upgraded bus lanes – Curbside 7am-7pm lanes – Red coloration – Overhead signs for visibility – "Delivery Windows" in retail core ▮ Off-board fare collection ▮ Transit Signal Priority ▮ Simplified service pattern ▮ New shelters

decisions.rationale: Cited block p004_c0008 text is 'Stations' (not about transit signal priority), and p005_c0002 describes Bx12 SBS features on Fordham Road — a different corridor. Neither block explicitly states that transit signal priority is a treatment on the Webster Avenue corridor or project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▮ New/upgraded bus lanes – Curbside 7am-7pm lanes – Red coloration – Overhead signs for visibility – "Delivery Windows" in retail core ▮ Off-board fare collection ▮ Transit Signal Priority ▮ Simplified service pattern ▮ New shelters

decisions.rationale: Block p004_c0002 merely lists 'Bus lanes' as a label on a generic 'Features of Select Bus Service' slide. This is a feature listing, not an explicit statement that bus lanes are a treatment on any specific corridor or project.
Block p004_c0005 is an image block with no text content. It does not explicitly state that SBS stations are a treatment on any specific corridor or project.
Block p004_c0003 is an image block with no text content. It does not explicitly state that SBS branding is a treatment on any specific corridor or project.

Block p004_c0004 text is 'Branding' — not about passenger information. In any case, this slide shows generic SBS feature labels. A mere label on a features slide does not explicitly state that passenger information is a treatment on any specific corridor or project.
